                                GUARANTEE AGREEMENT

         AGREEMENT entered into between REPUBLIC OF INDONESIA (--Guarantor")
and INTERNATIONAL BANK FO R RECONST RUCT ION AND DEVELOPMENT
("Bank .. ) ("G uarantee Agreement" or -- rnRD Guarantee Agreement") in connection with
the Loan Agreement of the Signature Date between the Bank and PT PERUSAHAAN
LI STRIK NEGARA (PERSERO) ("Borrower"), concerning Loan No. 98290-ID
("Loan Agreement" or ••fBRD Loan Agreement"). The Guarantor and the Bank hereby
agree as fo llows :

                 ARTICLE I -GEN ERAL CONDITIONS; DEFI N ITIONS

       Section 1.0 I. The General Cond iti ons (as de tined in the Appendix to the IBRD
Loan Agreement) app ly to and form part of th is Agreement.

        Section 1.02. Unless the context requires otherwise, the capitalized terms used in
this Agreement have the meanings ascribed to them in the General Co nditions or in the
IBRD Loan Agreement.

                                ARTICLE II -GUARANTEE

         Section 2.0 I. The Guarantor declares its commitment to the objectives of the
Program and the MPA Program. To this end, without limitation or restriction upon any of
its other obligations under the IBRD Guarantee Agreement, the Guarantor hereby
unconditionally guarantees, as primary obligor and not as surety merely , the due and
punctual payment of all Loan Payments payable by the Borrower pursuant to the IBRD
Loan Agreement, and the Guarantor shall from time to time take such action as may be
necessary or appropriate on its part to ensure prompt perfonnance by the Borrower of its
obligations under the IBRD Loan Agreement.
